---
format: nonexistent-format-xyz
---

# Deterministic render failure

This fixture makes `quarto render` fail (exit 1, "Validation of YAML front
matter failed") in **any** environment — it names an output format that does
not exist, so the failure needs no kernel and does not depend on which Python
or Jupyter the host resolves. The integration test uses it to exercise the
extension's non-zero-exit path (error surfaced in the Output channel, command
resolves without crashing) deterministically.

(For the real-world missing-Jupyter degradation case, see `needs-jupyter.qmd` —
that one is environment-dependent and verified live via the CLI, not in the
host integration test, because the test host resolves a Jupyter-capable Python.)
